summary: The session focused on the Argentina vs. France World Cup final, highlighting the praise for Argentina's team goal and the criticism of France's performance. Key players mentioned include Messi and Di Maria, with Argentina leading 2-0 in the match.
facts: Argentina scored a team goal in the World Cup final against France, which was praised as fantastic and beautiful. The score was 2-0 in favor of Argentina during the match. Messi and Di Maria were specifically mentioned as playing well in the final. France had no attempts on goal after 35 minutes of the match.
